scripts.build: cmd /c regenerate_thumbnails.bat && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File convert_videos.ps1 && node build.js
scripts.clean: cmd /c regenerate_thumbnails.bat clean && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File convert_videos.ps1 clean && if exist dist rmdir /s /q dist
scripts.deploy:ftp: echo Upload the dist/ folder to your web host via FTP/SFTP
